arts.ttl: ‘My message is…’: Portsmouth boss fires clear statement to ‘teen sensation’ as he arrives at Fratton
arts.sum: Thomas Waddingham has been told he will feature in the Championship this season - if he’s good enough.

arts.ttl: ‘Won’t be going anywhere’ – John Mousinho shares clear Portsmouth stance on rarely-seen summer signing
arts.sum: Portsmouth boss John Mousinho has said Harvey Blair will not be heading out on loan this month as… The post ‘Won’t be going anywhere’ – John Mousinho shares clear Portsmouth stance on rarely-seen summer signing appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Tommy Smith and Darragh Lenihan admission could have Middlesbrough transfer implications
arts.sum: However, clubs can take players out of their squad this month even if they remain at the club, with Alex Bangura not included in Boro’s 25 this season due to having a long-term Achilles injury. Michael Carrick admits he is not yet certain if Darragh Lenihan or Tommy Smith will play again this season - which could have transfer implications for Middlesbrough this month.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough man emerges on radar of fellow Championship side
arts.sum: Middlesbrough attacker Alex Gilbert is wanted by Swansea City, according to a report by Football League World. Middlesbrough’s… The post Middlesbrough man emerges on radar of fellow Championship side appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray in talks over Championship return and first game could be against Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Mowbray had a three-year spell at West Brom early in his management career and led the Baggies to the Championship title before his move to Celtic after relegation from the Premier League the following season. Tony Mowbray is in talks to make an emotional return to West Brom - and could lead the team for the first time against Middlesbrough .

arts.ttl: New Luton Town boss discusses Isaiah Jones's arrival from Middlesbrough before his arrival
arts.sum: New Luton Town boss Matt Bloomfield says he was delighted to see the club sign Isaiah Jones from Middlesbrough this month, despite having no say so in the decision. The club’s chief executive Gary Sweet, who was the man behind the Jones deal and then appointing Bloomfield, added: “We’re delighted to get Isaiah in the door.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick explains Middlesbrough's George Edmundson decision as Ipswich talks continue
arts.sum: Michael Carrick has explained why he wants to make George Edmundson a permanent Middlesbrough signing this month - with the defender’s loan form and overall career experience the biggest factors. Boro have decided to try and make Edmundson’s loan move to Boro a permanent one this month, though parent club Ipswich Town rejected the first bid believed to be £350k, with a further £350k on top if Boro win promotion.

arts.ttl: John Mousinho's fitness warning over Portsmouth newcomers - and his masterplan to get them games
arts.sum: John Mousinho has unveiled his first-team pathway for Pompey’s transfer newcomers.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss reveals Liverpool signing’s Fratton future as he’s handed attacking fitness boost
arts.sum: Harvey Blair is going nowhere in the January window as he was welcomed back into the Pompey fold.

arts.ttl: Ex-Portsmouth, Wolves and Bristol Rovers winger Kyle Bennett: I quit professional football aged 30 to be with my terminally ill dad. Family comes first
arts.sum: Chasing back from the corner he had just delivered, Kyle Bennett snapped into successive tackles to retrieve possession, before crashing a 25-yard shot on the run into the top corner of Lichfield City’s net.
